defectsCaughtAndFixed.description: routeTree.gen.ts did not register the newly-added /board and /chain/$issueNumber routes — both rendered 'Not Found' on first load
defectsCaughtAndFixed.fix: Registered AuthenticatedBoardRoute + AuthenticatedChainIssueNumberRoute in apps/orchestrator/src/routeTree.gen.ts following existing pattern. Typecheck passed clean.

defectsCaughtAndFixed.description: Local D1 missing 0009_worktree_reservations migration — POST /api/chains/:n/checkout 500'd with 'no such table: worktree_reservations'
defectsCaughtAndFixed.evidence: orchestrator.log: 'Error: D1_ERROR: no such table: worktree_reservations: SQLITE_ERROR'
defectsCaughtAndFixed.fix: Ran `pnpm db:migrate:local` (applied 0009_worktree_reservations.sql). Note: migration artifact itself was already in repo — only the local DB needed to be brought current. No code change required.

steps.description: kata enter research + kata link <n> puts session in sidebar under project
steps.reason: Requires kata CLI + real SDK runner + GH issue linkage. Code-level verification: kata_state event → SessionDO writes lastKataMode/issueNumber; session-do.ts:2290-2314 shows the handler. Chain-tab open path exists in use-tab-sync.ts + nav-sessions.tsx.

steps.description: Two same-issue sessions cluster under a chain tab with pipeline dots
steps.reason: Same as VP1.1 — requires live multi-session flow. Implementation files present: use-tab-sync.ts (chain TabKind), nav-sessions.tsx (chain cluster grouping).

steps.actual: GET /chain/16 → 200 with main text '#16 workspace: (unknown) No sessions for this issue yet. Select project… <worktree picker> Start research'. Timeline shell + CTA both rendered. (Rows empty because no real chain sessions exist in local D1.)

steps.description: Second chain #43 on same worktree dev1 returns 409 with #42 reservation details
After issue close / release, worktree becomes reusable
steps.actual: POST /api/chains/42/release → 200 {released:true,count:1}; subsequent POST /api/chains/99/checkout on dev1 → 200 (worktree freed)
Board page rendered with 3 swim lanes (Enhancement / Bug / Other) × 6 columns each (BACKLOG, RESEARCH, PLANNING, IMPLEMENTATION, VERIFY, DONE). Sidebar nav includes 'Board' link.

steps.description: New issue with no sessions appears in Backlog
steps.actual: /api/chains returned {"chains":[],"more_issues_available":false}. In local dev there are no GH issues to join against — the column computation logic is exercised in unit tests (57 test files, 682 tests, all pass including kanban-column derivation for spec table B7).

steps.description: Starting research session moves card to Research column
steps.reason: Requires real kata session flow. Column derivation tested via unit tests. Move verified only transitively.

steps.description: Mode transition emits close 4411, spawns new runner with artifact preamble
steps.actual: packages/shared-transport/src/dial-back-client.ts:43 — CLOSE_MODE_TRANSITION = 4411 constant in terminal close-code set; session-do.ts:767 closes connection with (4411, 'mode_transition'); session-do.ts:891 emits mode_transition_preamble_degraded sentinel on failure; session-do.ts:2290-2314 hooks kata_state.currentMode transitions on chain-linked sessions and calls handleModeTransition (fire-and-forget); session-do.ts:2299-2302 respects continueSdk=true opt-out. Full E2E requires live SDK query() — exercised in implementation-phase unit tests.

steps.description: --continue-sdk keeps runner PID and sdk_session_id unchanged
steps.actual: session-do.ts:2299-2302 — explicit continueSdk=true branch skips reset entirely with a log line; no handleModeTransition call.

regressionGates.migration: 0009_worktree_reservations applied to local D1 — 5 commands executed successfully

summary: 4 VP steps pass directly (VP1.3, all VP2, VP3.1). 3 steps code-verified (VP3.2, VP4.1, VP4.2) since they require a live SDK/kata session which cannot be driven synthetically. 3 steps skipped for same reason (VP1.1, VP1.2, VP3.3). Two defects caught during verification and fixed: (1) routeTree.gen.ts missing new routes — fixed by registering Board + Chain imports; (2) local D1 missing 0009 migration — fixed by running db:migrate:local.
